title: CIT Reforged
description: A fork of CIT Resewn for the Forge Mod Loader
body:
A fork of [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for the Forge Mod Loader. It is a standalone implementation of MCPatcher's CIT features (most commonly found in OptiFine).

> Because not everyone should have to use OptiFine

### Issues
Please ensure that when using this mod you **DO NOT** report any issues to CIT Resewn directly. Report the issue to my GitHub repository first, I will then figure out if it needs to be sent upstream.

### What about X version?
Unless it is one of the versions listed as planned in the GitHub README, chances are it will probably never be supported.

### What about X loader?
While NeoForge support is possible on the versions where it exists, anything else is absolutely out of the question.
